title: Aurora, 61355, Palm Pals Snowy Polar Bear, 5In, Soft Toy, White
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Polar Bear cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: From the manufacturer Palm Pals Snowy Polar Bear Soft Toy Palm Pals Snowy Polar Bear Soft Toy fits perfectly into the palm of your hand, he is full of beans which makes him super soft and cuddly. His body is a soft white plush material. Palm Pals Snowy Polar Bear Soft Toy is a beautiful white polar bear measuring 13 cm. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Polar Bear.
